components.name: constants
components.description: Project-wide constants and shared header definitions

components.name: kiroku
components.description: Logging library — thread-safe, multi-sink logger with file rotation and configurable formatters

components.name: fusion
components.description: Sensor fusion engine — correlates events from Sentinel, DADS, and ACCD across time and space

components.name: classifier
components.description: Threat classifier — ML inference via ONNX Runtime, outputs threat score and category

components.name: response
components.description: Response engine — executes pre-approved automated actions on high-confidence threats

components.name: learning
components.description: Adaptive learning pipeline — stores operator decisions as labeled data for periodic retraining

components.name: ui
components.description: Test harness (Qt6) — schema-driven UnitTestInjector and UnitTestExtractor, scenario picker, CLI args

components.name: denso
components.description: Transport and messaging library — wire protocol, topic routing, serialization, QoS

components.name: okuden
components.description: Server framework — session management, authentication, routing, persistence
